name: Legal

lifecycle.name: Intake / Matter Setup
lifecycle.description: Identify parties, scope, jurisdiction; open the matter

lifecycle.name: Counsel Review
lifecycle.description: User's counsel reviews; attests at activation

lifecycle.name: Prosecution / Maintenance / Forward Defense
lifecycle.description: Deadline tracking, office actions, maintenance fees, forward-defense documentation

workers.name: Paralegal
workers.capabilitySummary: Drafts multi-party legal instrument bundles (loan, warrant, advisor RSPA, IP assignment, employment offer) from templates with counsel-review markers, cross-document validation, signature-package handoff to Dropbox Sign, and counterparty-facing adversarial AI review prompts. Does not advise, does not file, does not replace counsel.
workers.creator: sociii-spine

canvasTabs.label: Current matter
canvasTabs.description: Active matter — parties, terms, status, next action

canvasTabs.label: Documents
canvasTabs.description: Drafted instruments in this matter — counsel-review-required markers, version trail

canvasTabs.label: Counterparties
canvasTabs.description: All parties to the matter — entity types, jurisdictions, contact info, signing roles

canvasTabs.label: Templates
canvasTabs.description: Platform templates + Studio Locker firm-specific overrides

canvasTabs.label: Signature status
canvasTabs.description: Dropbox Sign status per recipient, per document

canvasTabs.label: Counsel review
canvasTabs.description: Flagged questions for counsel; attestation status

canvasTabs.label: Audit trail
canvasTabs.description: Logbook entries on this matter's DTC — every draft, every signature event, hash-anchored

scope_in: Draft instruments from declared templates
Assemble bundles with cross-document references validated
Generate counterparty-facing AI review prompts
Mark every draft DRAFT — counsel-review-required
Produce Dropbox-Sign-ready PDFs with signature flow declared
Track signature status from DBX Sign webhooks
Store executed originals as compound DTCs in Vault
scope_out: Determining whether a transaction is legal
refusal_modes: User asks for legal advice — redirect to counsel
User asks to file with any authority — out of scope
Bundle math doesn't reconcile — hard stop
User asks worker to act as authorized signer — refused

coming_soon: Automated foreign-counsel routing for non-US parties
Embedded signing on canvas (today handed off to DBX Sign)
workers._status_note: Spec'd 2026-06-02 per CODEX-S52.16. Justification: this worker has been used informally throughout S52.x (Kent RSPA+IP+Standby Offer; Robert Loan+Warrant+Advisor; advisor letters batch). Counsel-review-required marker is non-negotiable per project_user_counsel_attestation_pattern. Flipped to live 2026-06-02 per user-counsel attestation — Sean attests as founder for SOCIII's own legal-instrument drafting; every produced document still carries DRAFT — counsel-review-required header.

workers.name: Patent Worker
workers.capabilitySummary: Manages a patent portfolio's full lifecycle — provisional drafting, deadline tracking, prior-art audit via USPTO+Google Patents+EPO, family-tree management, foreign filing decisions, prosecution response candidates. Hard-stops on 35 USC 102(b) grace-period violations and maintenance-fee deadlines. Does not file, does not opine on patentability, does not represent user before USPTO.
workers.creator: sociii-spine

canvasTabs.label: Portfolio
canvasTabs.description: All filings — filed, drafted, deferred — by status, jurisdiction, family

canvasTabs.label: Deadlines
canvasTabs.description: Hard-stop dates: provisional→non-provisional 12-month, PCT priority, national phase 30/31-month, office action 3-month, maintenance fees

canvasTabs.label: Filings
canvasTabs.description: One row per filing — app number, named inventors, assignee, status, counsel

canvasTabs.label: Family tree
canvasTabs.description: Parent-child relationships across continuations, divisionals, CIPs, PCT, foreign nationals

canvasTabs.label: Inventors
canvasTabs.description: Inventor list with contribution attribution — 35 USC 116 reconciliation

canvasTabs.label: Prior art
canvasTabs.description: USPTO + Google Patents + EPO Espacenet search results — references, not opinions

canvasTabs.label: Public disclosures
canvasTabs.description: Every public disclosure (papers, talks, demos, GitHub commits, social posts) mapped against grace-period viability

canvasTabs.label: Foreign filing
canvasTabs.description: Per-country cost / value matrix; PCT vs. direct nationals; absolute-novelty warnings

canvasTabs.label: Audit trail
canvasTabs.description: Logbook entries on each matter DTC — every draft, prior-art search, grace-period audit, counsel correspondence

scope_in: Drafting provisionals + non-provisionals + claim sets
Tracking USPTO + PCT + national-phase + maintenance-fee deadlines (alerts at 90/60/30/14/7/3/1 days)
Auditing public disclosures against 35 USC 102(b) one-year grace period
Patent family management — parent-child cross-reference validation
Inventor list reconciliation per 35 USC 116
Foreign filing decision support — country cost/value matrix
Prior art search via USPTO PatFT + Google Patents + EPO Espacenet (results, not opinions)
Office action response drafting
Assignment document drafting (inventor → company)
scope_out: Responding to office actions on the user's behalf
refusal_modes: User asks for patentability opinion — redirect to counsel
User asks to file directly with USPTO — out of scope
User asks to backdate disclosure or filing — refused (fraud)
Grace period violation detected — hard stop with explanation
Inventor list incomplete — refused until reconciled

data_fees.note: Free USPTO Open Data API; charge customer 100% markup ($0.02/query)
Free EPO API; charge customer 100% markup

coming_soon: USPTO PatFT live integration (today the prior-art tab is fixture-only)
Counsel CC on every alert email (Studio Locker field exists, not wired)
workers._status_note: Spec'd 2026-06-02 per CODEX-S52.17. SOCIII's own portfolio is dogfood case: 3 provisionals filed 2026-05-24/25 (Audit Trail, Knowledge Capture, RAAS 5-Tier) + 3 drafted pending counsel (Escrow Locker, Title & Property Assurance, Build-Without-Code). Hard grace-period deadline ~2027-06-01 for canvas content types + wearable contexts newly disclosed on sociii.ai/docs. Flipped to live 2026-06-02 per user-counsel attestation; every drafted filing still carries DRAFT — counsel-review-required header; PATENT WORKER NEVER FILES (counsel files).

workers.name: Litigation Discovery
workers.capabilitySummary: Surfaces case-bringable violation patterns from the Parcel Atlas substrate (RESPA Section 8, AfBA non-disclosure, escrow self-dealing, steering, deed fraud). Generates prosecution-grade or demand-letter-grade evidence packages tailored to State AG or plaintiff firm constituency. AG tier subsidized as forcing-function distribution channel; plaintiff firm tier monetized. Does not litigate.
workers.creator: sociii-spine

canvasTabs.label: Case Pipeline
canvasTabs.description: Identified case-bringable patterns sorted by aggregate damages exposure or political value to AG

canvasTabs.label: Violation Patterns
canvasTabs.description: Substrate-surfaced patterns with evidence weight scoring

canvasTabs.label: Defendants / Subpoena Targets
canvasTabs.description: Brokers / title cos / lenders / escrow holders with highest evidence weight; tier-gated

canvasTabs.label: Evidence Packages
canvasTabs.description: Generated evidence binders for filed cases or open investigations

canvasTabs.label: Demand Letters
canvasTabs.description: PARA-001-drafted demand letters with substrate-derived exhibits attached

canvasTabs.label: Case Status
canvasTabs.description: Tracked open cases / investigations with timeline + counsel CC + next deadlines

canvasTabs.label: Press Watchlist
canvasTabs.description: Tracked press coverage of cases brought from substrate

canvasTabs.label: Audit Trail
canvasTabs.description: Logbook of evidence queries + generated packages + handoffs to PARA-001

scope_in: Surfacing violation patterns from the Parcel Atlas substrate
Generating evidence packages (prosecution-grade for AGs, demand-letter-grade for plaintiff firms)
Ranking defendants / subpoena targets by evidence weight + dollar exposure
Handing off to PARA-001 for instrument drafting
Tracking case status across the firm's docket
Press watchlist for cases brought from substrate
scope_out: Filing cases (user files; we provide evidence)
Issuing subpoenas (AG issues; we identify targets)

coming_soon: State court docket integration (Westlaw / Lexis API)
Press release auto-generation upon case filing (AG mode only)
workers._status_note: Spec'd 2026-06-02 per CODEX-S52.22. Consumes ESC-013 Parcel Atlas substrate. AG tier is the forcing function in the four-constituency sales motion; plaintiff bar tier is fast monetization. Development status until Parcel Atlas substrate ships.

workers.name: Compliance Defense
workers.capabilitySummary: Proactively audits defense-firm client books against the Parcel Atlas substrate. Surfaces pre-litigation exposure for each client (RESPA Section 8 fingerprints, AfBA non-disclosure, escrow self-dealing signals, steering patterns). Generates remediation roadmaps + forward-defense documentation. Hardens client posture before AG / plaintiff bar action. Does not litigate.
workers.creator: sociii-spine

canvasTabs.label: Client Book
canvasTabs.description: Defense firm's client list with per-client exposure score derived from substrate match

canvasTabs.label: Exposure Map
canvasTabs.description: Heat map of each client's exposure across pattern dimensions

canvasTabs.label: Remediation Roadmaps
canvasTabs.description: Per-client remediation plans

canvasTabs.label: Forward Defense Docs
canvasTabs.description: Audit-anchored documentation of remediation for evidence-of-good-faith

canvasTabs.label: Enforcement Alerts
canvasTabs.description: Active AG investigations + plaintiff filings matching firm's client patterns

canvasTabs.label: Competitor Exposure
canvasTabs.description: Competitor firms' client exposure (informational for client acquisition)

canvasTabs.label: Audit Trail
canvasTabs.description: Logbook of audits run + remediation actions + forward-defense generation

scope_in: Auditing defense firm's client book against the Parcel Atlas substrate
Generating per-client exposure scores
Producing remediation roadmaps per client
Generating forward-defense documentation packages
Alerting firm to active AG investigations matching their clients
Tracking remediation progress

workers._status_note: Spec'd 2026-06-02 per CODEX-S52.22. Reactive to LIT-001 AG/plaintiff activity. Development status until Parcel Atlas ships and LIT-001 activates first case-press cycle.

workers.name: Transaction Due Diligence
workers.capabilitySummary: Generates transaction-time audit-chain reports on every parcel in a deal — portfolio acquisition, REIT, real-estate fund, commercial-property purchase. Surfaces title risk + encumbrance risk + chain-of-title gaps + zoning/permit issues. Produces DD memoranda formatted for client delivery. Reduces big-law partner DD review time from days to hours per parcel.
workers.creator: sociii-spine

canvasTabs.label: Active Deals
canvasTabs.description: Open transactions with status, parcel count, DD progress, target close

canvasTabs.label: Portfolio Map
canvasTabs.description: GeoJSON map of all parcels in the current transaction with risk-color overlay

canvasTabs.label: Title Risk
canvasTabs.description: Per-parcel chain-of-title analysis with gap detection + flags

canvasTabs.label: Encumbrances
canvasTabs.description: Active liens, easements, deed restrictions per parcel; aggregate exposure

canvasTabs.label: Regulatory Layer
canvasTabs.description: FIRPTA / FinCEN GTO / OFAC matches, zoning, environmental flags

canvasTabs.label: DD Memoranda
canvasTabs.description: Generated DD memos formatted for client delivery; counsel-review-required markers

canvasTabs.label: Comparable Deals
canvasTabs.description: Recent comparable transactions with audit-chain provenance for valuation defensibility

canvasTabs.label: Audit Trail
canvasTabs.description: Logbook of DD queries + memos + handoffs

scope_in: Transaction-time audit-chain reports on every parcel in a deal
Title risk + encumbrance risk + chain-of-title gap surfacing
FIRPTA / FinCEN GTO / OFAC compliance flagging
Zoning + entitlement check for commercial / development deals
DD memoranda formatted for client delivery
Comparable deal surfacing with audit-chain provenance
Multi-jurisdictional portfolio handling
scope_out: Substituting for partner judgment on deal-breaker materiality

coming_soon: Lender title insurance auto-quote based on substrate risk
workers._status_note: Spec'd 2026-06-02 per CODEX-S52.22. Big-law partner adoption — longest sales cycle but highest contract size. Development status until Parcel Atlas ships.

workers.name: Closing Attorney
workers.capabilitySummary: Anchors every closing on the SOCIII audit chain in attorney-closing states (NJ, NY, MA, CT, NC, SC, GA, etc.). Generates per-closing forward-defense documentation establishing documentable care for malpractice exposure. Provides closing pipeline + per-closing risk surface + practice-wide audit trail. Reduces closing time by automating chain-of-title, encumbrance, and disclosure verification. Does not substitute for attorney judgment.
workers.creator: sociii-spine

canvasTabs.label: Closing Pipeline
canvasTabs.description: Active closings sorted by target close date with status, parties, exposure score

canvasTabs.label: Closing Detail
canvasTabs.description: Single-closing workspace with chain-of-title verification, encumbrance check, disclosure compliance, signature flow

canvasTabs.label: Forward Defense
canvasTabs.description: Per-closing forward-defense documentation packages (audit-anchored evidence of care)

canvasTabs.label: Practice Exposure
canvasTabs.description: Practice-wide exposure; identifies trend risk + carrier-reportable patterns

canvasTabs.label: CLE Credits
canvasTabs.description: CLE credits earned via state bar partnerships

canvasTabs.label: Malpractice Carrier Reports
canvasTabs.description: Carrier-formatted reports demonstrating audit-anchored process; supports premium reduction

canvasTabs.label: Audit Trail
canvasTabs.description: Logbook of all closings + forward-defense docs + carrier interactions

canvasTabs.label: Signed Docs
canvasTabs.description: SOCIII anchor records for every executed closing document — immutable chain proof, any signing rail

scope_in: Anchoring every closing on the SOCIII audit chain
Generating per-closing forward-defense documentation
Pre-closing verification: chain-of-title, encumbrances, disclosures, TRID compliance
Signature flow integration with Dropbox Sign + state-specific notary requirements
Closing pipeline management
Practice-wide exposure monitoring
CLE credit tracking via state bar partnerships
Malpractice carrier reporting
scope_out: Substituting for attorney judgment on materiality of defects
Providing legal advice to closing parties

coming_soon: State bar association CLE-credit partnerships (NJ, NY, MA, NC, GA first)
Direct integration with state e-recording portals
workers._status_note: Spec'd 2026-06-02 per CODEX-S52.22. Structural adoption channel in attorney-closing states (~19 states require attorney closings). Development status until Parcel Atlas ships.

_bundles_removed_2026_06_02: Per Amazon-model pricing discipline. Each worker is a discrete product at its tier price. No bundle-and-save framing.
